nasb.text: I will cast you out of My sight, as I have cast out all your brothers, all the offspring of Ephraim.

esv.text: And I will cast you out of my sight, as I cast out all your kinsmen, all the offspring of Ephraim.

cnv.text: 我必把你們從我面前趕出，像我從前趕出你們的眾兄弟，以法蓮所有的後裔一樣。

ccb.text: 我要把你们从我面前赶走，好像从前赶走你们的弟兄以法莲人一样。’”
